item.title: Re: I really like it
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the feedback! My reasoning behind classifying it as "safe" is that its effects cannot activate spontaneously; it only exhibits anomalous effects when it is supplied with power and people are listening to it. So, despite the fact that its effects can have a profound impact on the course of history itself, you theoretically could "put it in a locker and have the doors closed" and nothing bad would happen. The extra security measures are put in place to make sure nobody misuses it or accidentally triggers it. That is something I thought about while writing, so I totally understand your line of thinking.

item.title: I really like it
item.content:encoded: So I do really like this article, but at the same time this is a lot for a safe SCP. Normally a SCP with the object class "Safe" is able to be put in a locker and have the doors closed and that's that. So yes it is great but at least in my opinion it should not be labeled "safe".
